prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SNAPATITEUTENSILS-4PC Product Type: FLATWARE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Camping Utensil Set Pocket-sized Cutlery Travel 4pc Description: Eat lunch or your favorite snacks on the go with the ASR Outdoor Snapatite 4 in 1 Utensil Set.

This set comes with 4 complete utensil sets - each piece comes apart to reveal a spoon, fork, knife and bottle opener. When you're done eating, you can simply snap the knife and spoon piece back into the fork piece with the bottle opener.

These utensils are constructed of durable BPA free plastic, and they are dishwasher safe. They're lightweight and pocket-sized, making them ideal for travel, camping, hiking, road trips and more. Make sure to keep one of these sets in your bag, backpack, car or camping gear for your next adventure. Search Terms: camping utensil outdoor accessories gear stove cookware eating open fire cooking camp light portable table campng flatware eatting plates backpacking spoon knife spork survival roasting marshmello set Features: - ASR Outdoor 4 Piece Snap Utensil Set - Multi-colored - Snapped Together Length: 6.75" | Pocket-sized - 4 in 1 Function: Spoon, Fork, Knife & Bottle Opener on Each Piece - BPA Free Plastic & Dishwasher Safe - Knife Sheathed When Not In Use for Safety === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
